title: The Controlled SOP Lifecycle
alt: Five ordered stages of the controlled SOP lifecycle from authoring to archival

items.label: Authoring
items.desc: Written with input from those who perform the task

items.label: Review & Approval
items.desc: Quality sign-off with dated, attributable signatures

items.label: Controlled Issue
items.desc: Only the current version available at point of use

items.label: Training Assignment
items.desc: Triggered by issue before the procedure is followed

items.label: Archival
items.desc: Retired versions retained and retrievable for inspection
